value.description: Light-emitting diode (LED) backlights modules, the foregoing which are lighting sources that consist of one or more LEDs and one or more connectors and are mounted on a printed circuit or other similar substrate, and other passive components, whether or not combined with optical components or protective diodes, and used as backlights illumination for liquid crystal displays (LCDs)
value.descriptionEn: Light-emitting diode (LED) backlights modules, the foregoing which are lighting sources that consist of one or more LEDs and one or more connectors and are mounted on a printed circuit or other similar substrate, and other passive components, whether or not combined with optical components or protective diodes, and used as backlights illumination for liquid crystal displays (LCDs)
value.descriptionZh: Light-emitting diode (LED) backlights modules，上述其为 lighting sources 该 consist of one 及以上 LEDs 及 one 及以上连接器及为安装 on a 印刷 circuit or 其他类似 substrate，及其他 passive components，无论是否 combined with optical components or protective diodes，及使用的 as backlights illumination for liquid crystal displays (LCDs)

value.description: Touch-sensitive data input devices (so-called “touch screens”) without display capabilities, for incorporation into apparatus having a display, which function by detecting the presence and location of a touch within the display area (such sensing may be obtained by means of resistance, electrostatic capacity, acoustic pulse recognition, infrared lights or other touch-sensitive technology)
value.descriptionEn: Touch-sensitive data input devices (so-called “touch screens”) without display capabilities, for incorporation into apparatus having a display, which function by detecting the presence and location of a touch within the display area (such sensing may be obtained by means of resistance, electrostatic capacity, acoustic pulse recognition, infrared lights or other touch-sensitive technology)
value.descriptionZh: Touch-sensitive data input devices (so-called “touch screens”) without display capabilities，for incorporation into 装置具有 a display，其 function by detecting presence 及 location 一种 touch within display area (该 sensing may be obtained by means of resistance，electrostatic 容量，acoustic pulse recognition，infrared lights or 其他 touch-sensitive technology)
